title: Theo's Sleepy Feelings
synopsis: Little Theo discovers that all his feelings are welcome at bedtime, learning to embrace both happy and worried thoughts as he drifts off to sleep surrounded by magical stars and gentle moonlight.

pages.text: Theo was getting ready for bed. He brushed his teeth and put on his soft pajamas. But his tummy felt funny. Sometimes at bedtime, Theo had big feelings.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes standing in a dreamy bedroom with soft watercolor walls in purple and blue gradients, gentle moonlight streaming through the window, floating clouds drifting nearby
illustration.alt: Theo in pajamas in his bedroom with moonlight

pages.text: Tonight, Theo felt excited about tomorrow. He also felt a little worried about the dark. His feelings swirled around like colorful clouds in his heart.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes sitting on his bed surrounded by swirling pastel clouds in purple and blue gradients, glowing stars floating around him, his round sleepy face showing mixed emotions in soft watercolor style
illustration.alt: Theo surrounded by swirling emotional clouds and stars

pages.text: Theo looked out his window at the twinkling stars. 'Hello, stars,' he whispered. 'I have happy feelings and scared feelings tonight.' The stars seemed to sparkle back at him.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes at his window looking up at glowing stars in the night sky, soft watercolor technique with dreamy purple and blue gradients, gentle moonlight illuminating his round sleepy face, ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Theo talking to stars through his window

pages.text: A gentle voice seemed to float from the stars: 'All feelings are okay, little Theo. Happy feelings, worried feelings, excited feelings - they're all part of you.'

illustration.description: Magical scene with Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes surrounded by floating clouds and glowing stars that seem to have gentle faces, soft watercolor style with pastel palette, dreamy purple and blue gradients creating an ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Theo receiving comfort from magical talking stars

pages.text: Theo climbed into his cozy bed. He took a deep breath and hugged his feelings close, just like hugging a soft teddy bear. The worried feelings felt smaller now.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes snuggled in bed with dreamy floating clouds around him, soft watercolor bedding in pastel palette, gentle moonlight streaming across his round sleepy face, glowing stars hovering above
illustration.alt: Theo peaceful in bed with floating clouds and stars

pages.text: As Theo's eyes grew heavy, the stars sang a lullaby. His happy feelings danced, his worried feelings rested, and sweet dreams began to visit. Good night, Theo.

illustration.description: Sleeping Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peacefully dreaming, surrounded by musical glowing stars and floating clouds in soft watercolor style, dreamy purple and blue gradients filling the scene, gentle moonlight creating an ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully with magical stars singing

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How did Theo feel at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Theo had mixed feelings - he felt excited about tomorrow and also a little worried about the dark.

questions.question: Who did Theo talk to about his feelings?
questions.explanation: Theo looked out his window and talked to the twinkling stars about his feelings.

questions.question: What did the stars tell Theo?
questions.explanation: The stars told Theo that all feelings are okay - happy feelings, worried feelings, and excited feelings.

questions.question: How did Theo feel about his worried feelings at the end?
questions.explanation: After talking to the stars and accepting his feelings, Theo's worried feelings felt smaller and more manageable.
